word: G2866 - κομψότερον - kompsóteron - komp-sot'-er-on - + began to amend

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κομψότερον

- Transliteration: Kompsoteron

- Phonetic: komp-sot'-er-on

- Definition:

1. more finely, better

- Origin: neuter comparative of a derivative of the base of G2865 (meaning properly, well dressed, i.e. nice)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter comparative of a derivative of the base of G2865 (meaning properly well dressed that is nice); figuratively convalescent: - + began to amend.
